moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships begin today, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Game, set, match! Wimbledon 2026 is officially underway from the All England Club. Who are you backing for the singles titles this year?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: London is serving up world-class tennis as Wimbledon 2026 begins! The famous grass courts are ready for action.

angles.name: First Round Focus
angles.copy: The first rounds are always packed with drama. Who are you hoping to see make it through to Week 2 at Wimbledon?

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival, a five-day celebration of music and arts, is currently running against the stunning backdrop of Blenheim Palace until July 1st.

angles.name: Atmosphere
angles.copy: Music and history collide! The Blenheim Palace Festival is ongoing until July 1st, bringing a unique atmosphere to the stately home.

angles.name: Last Chance
angles.copy: Catch the final days of the Blenheim Palace Festival! A stunning setting for a celebration of music and arts, ending July 1st.

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Continues
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park is in full swing, with global headline artists performing until July 12th in London.

angles.name: Live Music Buzz
angles.copy: Hyde Park is buzzing! BST Hyde Park is bringing huge names to London all week. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: London's Summer Soundtrack
angles.copy: London's summer soundtrack is live at BST Hyde Park! Big artists, big crowds, big vibes. Don't miss out!

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama, is airing nightly Sunday-Friday at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, with 'Unseen Bits' on Saturdays.

angles.name: Tonight's Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Tune in at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX for all the latest from the villa.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Who's cracking on and who's getting pied? Love Island UK is still delivering the summer gossip. What are your predictions?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 48
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls and her solo career, celebrates her 48th birthday today.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 48th birthday to pop icon Nicole Scherzinger! From Pussycat Dolls to solo hits, she's always brought the fire.

angles.name: Powerhouse Vocals
angles.copy: Happy 48th birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! Those powerhouse vocals still give us chills.

moments.title: Colin Hay (Men at Work) Turns 73
moments.blurb: Scottish-Australian musician Colin Hay, best known as the frontman of the iconic 80s band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the legendary Colin Hay of Men at Work! Still got that 'Down Under' charm.

angles.name: Men at Work frontman
angles.copy: It's Colin Hay's 73rd birthday! Cheers to the voice behind so many classic Men at Work tracks.

moments.title: Evelyn 'Champagne' King Turns 66
moments.blurb: American R&B, disco, and soul singer Evelyn 'Champagne' King, famous for 'Shame' and 'Love Come Down', celebrates her 66th birthday today.

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Evelyn 'Champagne' King, turning 66 today! Still making us 'Shame'-lessly dance.

angles.name: Soulful Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th birthday to soul and disco legend Evelyn 'Champagne' King! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Fantasia Barrino Turns 42
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American R&B and soul singer Fantasia Barrino, known for her powerful vocals and Broadway performances, celebrates her 42nd birthday today.

angles.name: Vocal Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 42nd Birthday to the incredible vocal talent, Fantasia Barrino! Still captivating audiences worldwide.

angles.name: R&B Star
angles.copy: Celebrating the 42nd birthday of R&B queen Fantasia today! What's your favourite song from her?

moments.title: Sam Farrar (Maroon 5) Turns 48
moments.blurb: American musician Sam Farrar, multi-instrumentalist for Maroon 5 and bassist for Phantom Planet, celebrates his 48th birthday today.

angles.name: Maroon 5 Member
angles.copy: Happy 48th birthday to Sam Farrar, multi-instrumentalist for Maroon 5! Keep those hits coming.

angles.name: Music Man
angles.copy: Celebrating Sam Farrar's 48th today! From Phantom Planet to Maroon 5, a true musical talent.

moments.title: Debbie Harry (Blondie) Turns 80
moments.blurb: Iconic American singer Debbie Harry, lead vocalist of the legendary new wave band Blondie, will celebrate her 80th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: Anticipating a huge 80th birthday for the incredible Debbie Harry on July 1st! The ultimate new wave queen.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to Blondie's Debbie Harry, turning 80 this Wednesday! What's your go-to Blondie track?

moments.title: Missy Elliott Turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott will celebrate her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true legend! Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st. Drop your favourite Missy track!

angles.name: Game Changer
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to the visionary Missy Elliott! She changed the game and is still doing it at 55 this Wednesday.

moments.title: Fred Schneider (The B-52s) Turns 75
moments.blurb: American singer Fred Schneider, known for his unique spoken-word vocals as a frontman for The B-52s, celebrates his 75th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Party Rocker
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to Fred Schneider of The B-52s on July 1st! Get ready to 'Love Shack'!

angles.name: Distinctive Voice
angles.copy: The distinctive voice of The B-52s, Fred Schneider, turns 75 this Wednesday! A true new wave icon.

moments.title: John Farnham Turns 77
moments.blurb: British-Australian pop and rock singer John Farnham, famous for 'You're the Voice', will celebrate his 77th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Power Ballad King
angles.copy: On July 1st, we're celebrating the 77th birthday of the incredible John Farnham! 'You're the Voice' still gives us goosebumps.

angles.name: Aussie Icon
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to John Farnham, turning 77 this Wednesday! An absolute legend of pop and rock.

moments.title: Tate McRae Turns 23
moments.blurb: Canadian singer, songwriter, and dancer Tate McRae, known for hits like 'greedy' and 'you broke me first', celebrates her 23rd birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Pop Sensation
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 23rd birthday to pop sensation Tate McRae on July 1st! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Rising Star
angles.copy: It's Tate McRae's 23rd birthday this Wednesday! A huge talent making waves in the music world.

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France kicks off on July 4th in Barcelona, promising 23 days of intense cycling action.

angles.name: Cycling Fever
angles.copy: The greatest race on two wheels is almost here! The Tour de France 2026 starts Saturday from Barcelona. Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Grand Depart
angles.copy: Get ready for the Grand Départ! The Tour de France begins this Saturday. Expect breathtaking scenery and incredible athleticism.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Warning for Weekend
moments.blurb: After a cooler start to the week, the Met Office warns of an 'increasingly likely' return to heatwave conditions across parts of the UK, especially England and Wales, this coming weekend (July 4-5), with temperatures potentially reaching 30°C.

angles.name: Weekend Heat
angles.copy: Get ready to feel the heat again! A heatwave is 'increasingly likely' for parts of the UK this coming weekend, with temperatures soaring. Stay safe!

angles.name: Summer Sun
angles.copy: Sunscreen and water bottles at the ready! Another heatwave is on the cards for the UK this weekend. How are you planning to keep cool?

angles.name: Local Impact
angles.copy: Devon, prepare for a hot one! The Met Office is forecasting a likely heatwave for the UK this weekend. Stay hydrated out there!

moments.title: Love Supreme Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Festival, a leading jazz, soul, and funk festival, takes place this weekend from July 3rd to 5th.

angles.name: Jazz & Soul Weekend
angles.copy: Get your groove on! Love Supreme Festival kicks off this Friday, July 3rd, for a weekend of the best in jazz, soul, and funk.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just days to go until Love Supreme Festival! Who are you excited to see at the UK's premier jazz and soul event?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin Soon
moments.blurb: The school summer holidays begin this week for Northern Ireland (July 1st), with most of England and Wales breaking up mid-July.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to summer holidays is ON! Northern Ireland schools break up this week, with the rest of the UK following soon. Any big plans?

angles.name: Local School Break
angles.copy: School's out for summer! For many in Northern Ireland, the summer holidays begin this week. For Wales, it's just around the corner!

angles.name: Devon Schools
angles.copy: Not long now until the school summer holidays in Devon! What are your plans for keeping the kids entertained?
